sentences.sentence: Adults and children are frequently confronted with statements about the alarming rate of loss of tropical rainforests.
sentences.translation: 成年人和儿童经常会接触到关于热带雨林正以惊人速度消失的说法。

structure.text: with statements about the alarming rate of loss of tropical rainforests
about the alarming rate of loss of tropical rainforests

difficult_points: be confronted with 是被动形式的固定搭配，表示“面对、接触到”。
about 后面的长介词短语说明 statements 的内容。
of loss of tropical rainforests 连续两个 of 短语层层限定 rate。

sentences.sentence: For example, one graphic illustration to which children might readily relate is the estimate that rainforests are being destroyed at a rate equivalent to one thousand football fields every forty minutes - about the duration of a normal classroom period.
sentences.translation: 例如，有一个儿童可能很容易理解的形象说明：据估计，雨林正以每四十分钟相当于一千个足球场的速度遭到破坏——大约就是一节普通课的时长。

structure.text: one graphic illustration to which children might readily relate
to which children might readily relate
the estimate that rainforests are being destroyed at a rate equivalent to one thousand football fields every forty minutes
that rainforests are being destroyed at a rate equivalent to one thousand football fields every forty minutes
about the duration of a normal classroom period

difficult_points: 主语 one graphic illustration 后接 to which 引导的定语从句，修饰这个“说明”。
that 引导同位语从句，解释 estimate 的具体内容。
are being destroyed 使用现在进行时的被动语态，强调破坏正在发生。
破折号后的短语把 forty minutes 换算成学生熟悉的课堂时长。

sentences.sentence: In the face of the frequent and often vivid media coverage, it is likely that children will have formed ideas about rainforests - what and where they are, why they are important, what endangers them - independent of any formal tuition.
sentences.translation: 面对频繁且常常十分生动的媒体报道，儿童很可能已经在没有任何正式教学的情况下形成了关于雨林的想法——雨林是什么、在哪里，为什么重要，以及什么会危及它们。

structure.text: In the face of the frequent and often vivid media coverage
that children will have formed ideas about rainforests
what and where they are, why they are important, what endangers them

difficult_points: it is likely 后面的 that 从句才是实际判断内容。
will have formed 是将来完成结构，用来推测孩子们在正式教学前已经形成想法。
破折号中三个疑问结构具体说明 ideas about rainforests 的内容。
independent of any formal tuition 表示这些想法不是来自正式课堂教学。

sentences.sentence: It is also possible that some of these ideas will be mistaken.
sentences.translation: 也有可能其中一些想法是错误的。

structure.text: that some of these ideas will be mistaken

difficult_points: It 作形式主语，真正的主语是 that 引导的从句。
some of these ideas 指上一句中孩子们形成的关于雨林的想法。
mistaken 在这里作形容词，表示这些想法本身可能有误。

sentences.sentence: Many studies have shown that children harbour misconceptions about "pure", curriculum science.
sentences.translation: 许多研究表明，儿童对“纯粹的”课程科学内容存在误解。

structure.text: that children harbour misconceptions about "pure", curriculum science

difficult_points: that 引导宾语从句，说明研究显示的结论。
harbour 在这里不是“停泊”，而是“怀有、持有”。
"pure", curriculum science 指学校课程中相对纯粹的科学知识。

sentences.sentence: These misconceptions do not remain isolated but become incorporated into a multifaceted, but organised, conceptual framework, making it and the component ideas, some of which are erroneous, more robust but also accessible to modification.
sentences.translation: 这些误解并不会孤立存在，而是会被纳入一个多面但有组织的概念框架，使这个框架及其组成观念——其中有些是错误的——更加稳固，同时也更容易被修正。

structure.text: do not remain isolated but become incorporated
into a multifaceted, but organised, conceptual framework
making it and the component ideas, some of which are erroneous, more robust but also accessible to modification
more robust but also accessible to modification

difficult_points: not ... but ... 连接两个相反动作，强调误解不是孤立存在而是被整合进框架。
incorporated into 是被动含义，表示“被纳入”。
making 引导结果性分词短语，说明这种整合造成的结果。
some of which are erroneous 插入说明 component ideas 中有一部分是错误的。

sentences.sentence: These ideas may be developed by children absorbing ideas through the popular media.
sentences.translation: 这些想法可能是儿童通过大众媒体吸收观念而形成的。

structure.text: by children absorbing ideas through the popular media
absorbing ideas through the popular media

difficult_points: may be developed 是情态动词加被动语态，表示这些想法可能被形成。
by children absorbing ideas 是 by 引出的方式或施事结构。
absorbing ideas through the popular media 说明孩子形成想法的渠道。

sentences.sentence: Sometimes this information may be erroneous.
sentences.translation: 有时这些信息可能是错误的。
difficult_points: this information 指前一句中大众媒体传递给儿童的信息。
may be 表示可能性，不是确定判断。
erroneous 是正式用词，意思是“错误的”。

sentences.sentence: It seems schools may not be providing an opportunity for children to re-express their ideas and so have them tested and refined by teachers and their peers.
sentences.translation: 看起来，学校可能并没有为儿童提供机会，让他们重新表达自己的想法，并因此由教师和同伴对这些想法进行检验和完善。

structure.text: schools may not be providing an opportunity for children to re-express their ideas and so have them tested and refined by teachers and their peers
an opportunity for children to re-express their ideas
for children to re-express their ideas
have them tested and refined by teachers and their peers

difficult_points: It seems 后省略了 that，引出作者的判断。
may not be providing 是进行时结构，强调学校当前可能没有在提供这种机会。
for children to re-express their ideas 修饰 opportunity，说明机会的用途。
have them tested and refined 是“have + 宾语 + 过去分词”结构，表示让想法被检验和完善。

sentences.sentence: Despite the extensive coverage in the popular media of the destruction of rainforests, little formal information is available about children's ideas in this area.
sentences.translation: 尽管大众媒体对雨林破坏进行了广泛报道，但关于儿童在这一领域想法的正式信息却很少。

structure.text: Despite the extensive coverage in the popular media of the destruction of rainforests
about children's ideas in this area

difficult_points: Despite 是介词，后面接名词短语，不是完整从句。
little formal information 表示“几乎没有正式信息”，带否定意味。
about children's ideas in this area 限定 information 的内容范围。

sentences.sentence: The aim of the present study is to start to provide such information, to help teachers design their educational strategies to build upon correct ideas and to displace misconceptions and to plan programmes in environmental studies in their schools.
sentences.translation: 本研究的目标是开始提供这类信息，帮助教师设计教育策略，以便建立在正确观念之上、消除误解，并在学校中规划环境研究课程。

structure.text: The aim of the present study
to start to provide such information
to help teachers design their educational strategies
to plan programmes in environmental studies in their schools

difficult_points: 主干是 The aim ... is ...，后面由多个不定式说明研究目的。
such information 指上一句所说关于儿童想法的正式信息。
build upon correct ideas 与 displace misconceptions 构成教育策略的两个方向。
in environmental studies in their schools 中两个 in 短语分别说明课程领域和实施地点。

expressions.text: the aim of the present study

sentences.sentence: The study surveys children's scientific knowledge and attitudes to rainforests.
sentences.translation: 该研究调查了儿童关于雨林的科学知识和态度。

structure.text: children's scientific knowledge and attitudes to rainforests

difficult_points: surveys 在这里作动词，表示“调查”。
children's 同时限定 scientific knowledge 和 attitudes。
attitudes to rainforests 中 to 表示态度所指向的对象。

sentences.sentence: Secondary school children were asked to complete a questionnaire containing five open-form questions.
sentences.translation: 中学生被要求完成一份包含五个开放式问题的问卷。

structure.text: to complete a questionnaire containing five open-form questions
a questionnaire containing five open-form questions

difficult_points: were asked 是被动语态，表示学生被要求做某事。
to complete a questionnaire 说明被要求完成的动作。
containing five open-form questions 是现在分词短语，修饰 questionnaire。

sentences.sentence: The most frequent responses to the first question were descriptions which are self-evident from the term "rainforest".
sentences.translation: 对第一个问题最常见的回答，是一些从“rainforest”这个词本身就显而易见的描述。

structure.text: The most frequent responses to the first question
descriptions which are self-evident from the term "rainforest"
which are self-evident from the term "rainforest"

difficult_points: The most frequent responses 是句子主语，不要把 question 当作主语。
which 引导定语从句，修饰 descriptions。
self-evident from the term 表示这些描述可以从词面直接看出来。

sentences.sentence: Some children described them as damp, wet or hot.
sentences.translation: 一些儿童把雨林描述为潮湿、湿润或炎热。
difficult_points: them 指代前文的 rainforests。
describe ... as ... 表示“把……描述为……”。
damp, wet or hot 是并列形容词，作宾语补足语。

sentences.sentence: The second question concerned the geographical location of rainforests.
sentences.translation: 第二个问题涉及雨林的地理位置。
difficult_points: concerned 在这里表示“涉及、关于”。
the geographical location 是该问题关注的具体内容。
of rainforests 限定 location，表示雨林的位置。

sentences.sentence: The commonest responses were continents or countries: Africa (given by 43% of children), South America (30%), Brazil (25%).
sentences.translation: 最常见的回答是洲或国家：非洲（43%的儿童给出）、南美洲（30%）和巴西（25%）。

structure.text: Africa (given by 43% of children), South America (30%), Brazil (25%)

difficult_points: 冒号后的内容是对 continents or countries 的具体列举。
given by 43% of children 是省略关系代词的过去分词短语，说明 Africa 这一答案的比例。
South America (30%), Brazil (25%) 中括号内省略了 given by children。

sentences.sentence: Some children also gave more general locations, such as being near the Equator.
sentences.translation: 还有一些儿童给出了更笼统的位置，例如靠近赤道。

structure.text: such as being near the Equator

difficult_points: also 表示这类回答是在前一类洲或国家之外的补充。
such as 引出 more general locations 的例子。
being near the Equator 是动名词短语，表示一种位置描述。

sentences.sentence: Responses to question three concerned the importance of rainforests.
sentences.translation: 对第三个问题的回答涉及雨林的重要性。
difficult_points: Responses to question three 是主语，to question three 修饰 responses。
concerned 表示“涉及”，连接回答和主题。
the importance of rainforests 是第三个问题关注的核心内容。

sentences.sentence: The dominant idea, raised by 64% of the pupils, was that rainforests provide animals with habitats.
sentences.translation: 最主要的观点是雨林为动物提供栖息地，这一观点由64%的学生提出。

structure.text: that rainforests provide animals with habitats

difficult_points: raised by 64% of the pupils 是插入的过去分词短语，补充说明该观点由谁提出。
was 后接 that 从句，说明 dominant idea 的具体内容。
provide animals with habitats 是 provide A with B 结构。

sentences.sentence: Fewer students responded that rainforests provide plant habitats, and even fewer mentioned the indigenous populations of rainforests.
sentences.translation: 较少的学生回答说雨林提供植物栖息地，而提到雨林原住民的人更少。

structure.text: mentioned the indigenous populations of rainforests

difficult_points: and 连接两个并列分句，后半句省略了 students。
even fewer 表示数量比前面的 fewer students 还少。
that 从句说明第一组学生回答的具体内容。
the indigenous populations of rainforests 指生活在雨林地区的原住民群体。

sentences.sentence: More girls (70%) than boys (60%) raised the idea of rainforest as animal habitats.
sentences.translation: 提出雨林是动物栖息地这一观点的女生比例（70%）高于男生（60%）。

structure.text: the idea of rainforest as animal habitats

difficult_points: More ... than ... 构成比较结构，对比女生和男生比例。
raised the idea 表示“提出这种想法”。
of rainforest as animal habitats 说明 idea 的具体内容。

sentences.sentence: Similarly, but at a lower level, more girls (13%) than boys (5%) said that rainforests provided human habitats.
sentences.translation: 类似地，但比例较低，更多女生（13%）而非男生（5%）表示雨林为人类提供栖息地。
difficult_points: Similarly 表示这一发现与前一句女生比例更高的情况相似。
but at a lower level 插入说明总体比例更低。
more girls than boys 仍然是比较结构。
that 从句是 said 的宾语，说明学生的回答内容。

expressions.meaning_zh: 在较低水平上；比例较低

sentences.sentence: These observations are generally consistent with our previous studies of pupils' views about the use and conservation of rainforests, in which girls were shown to be more sympathetic to animals and expressed views which seem to place an intrinsic value on non-human animal life.
sentences.translation: 这些观察结果总体上与我们此前关于学生对雨林利用与保护看法的研究一致；在那些研究中，女生被证明对动物更有同情心，并表达了似乎赋予非人类动物生命内在价值的观点。

structure.text: with our previous studies of pupils' views about the use and conservation of rainforests
in which girls were shown to be more sympathetic to animals and expressed views which seem to place an intrinsic value on non-human animal life
girls were shown to be more sympathetic to animals
expressed views which seem to place an intrinsic value on non-human animal life
which seem to place an intrinsic value on non-human animal life

difficult_points: be consistent with 表示“与……一致”，with 后接先前研究。
in which 引导非限制性定语从句，指代 previous studies。
girls were shown to be 使用被动结构，表示研究显示女生更同情动物。
which seem to place ... 修饰 views，说明这些观点似乎赋予动物生命内在价值。

sentences.sentence: The fourth question concerned the causes of the destruction of rainforests.
sentences.translation: 第四个问题涉及雨林遭到破坏的原因。

structure.text: the causes of the destruction of rainforests

difficult_points: concerned 再次表示“涉及、关于”。
the causes of the destruction 是名词短语，核心是 causes。
of rainforests 进一步限定 destruction，说明破坏的对象。

sentences.sentence: Perhaps encouragingly, more than half of the pupils (59%) identified that it is human activities which are destroying rainforests, some personalising the responsibility by the use of terms such as "we are".
sentences.translation: 也许令人鼓舞的是，超过一半的学生（59%）指出，破坏雨林的是人类活动，其中一些人还通过使用“we are”这样的说法把责任个人化。

structure.text: more than half of the pupils (59%)
that it is human activities which are destroying rainforests
some personalising the responsibility by the use of terms such as "we are"

difficult_points: Perhaps encouragingly 是句子副词，表达作者对结果的态度。
that 引导 identified 的宾语从句。
it is human activities which ... 是强调句结构，强调破坏者是人类活动。
some personalising ... 是独立主格结构，补充说明部分学生如何表达责任。

sentences.sentence: About 18% of the pupils referred specifically to logging activity.
sentences.translation: 约18%的学生明确提到了伐木活动。
difficult_points: About 18% of the pupils 是数量表达，表示学生中的一部分。
refer to 表示“提到、指称”，specifically 强调明确性。
logging activity 指砍伐树木的活动，是雨林破坏的具体原因之一。

sentences.sentence: One misconception, expressed by some 10% of the pupils, was that acid rain is responsible for rainforest destruction; a similar proportion said that pollution is destroying rainforests.
sentences.translation: 一个由约10%的学生表达出的误解是，酸雨要为雨林破坏负责；类似比例的学生说污染正在破坏雨林。

structure.text: expressed by some 10% of the pupils
that acid rain is responsible for rainforest destruction
acid rain is responsible for rainforest destruction
a similar proportion said that pollution is destroying rainforests

difficult_points: expressed by some 10% of the pupils 是插入的过去分词短语，修饰 misconception。
was 后的 that 从句说明误解的具体内容。
分号连接两个相关但独立的分句，第二个分句说明另一个相似回答。
is responsible for 表示“对……负责、是……的原因”。

sentences.sentence: Here, children are confusing rainforest destruction with damage to the forests of Western Europe by these factors.
sentences.translation: 在这里，儿童把雨林破坏与这些因素对西欧森林造成的损害混淆了。

structure.text: with damage to the forests of Western Europe by these factors
to the forests of Western Europe

difficult_points: Here 指前一句提到酸雨和污染的回答情境。
confuse A with B 表示“把 A 和 B 混淆”。
by these factors 说明西欧森林损害是由酸雨、污染等因素造成的。

sentences.sentence: While two fifths of the students provided the information that the rainforests provide oxygen, in some cases this response also embraced the misconception that rainforest destruction would reduce atmospheric oxygen, making the atmosphere incompatible with human life on Earth.
sentences.translation: 虽然五分之二的学生提供了雨林供氧这一信息，但在某些情况下，这一回答也包含了一个误解，即雨林破坏会减少大气中的氧气，使大气变得不适合地球上的人类生命。

structure.text: While two fifths of the students provided the information that the rainforests provide oxygen
this response also embraced the misconception
that rainforest destruction would reduce atmospheric oxygen
making the atmosphere incompatible with human life on Earth

difficult_points: While 引导让步状语从句，意思接近“虽然”。
that the rainforests provide oxygen 是 information 的同位语从句。
embraced the misconception 表示回答中也包含了某种误解。
making the atmosphere ... 是结果性分词短语，说明氧气减少会造成的结果。

sentences.sentence: In answer to the final question about the importance of rainforest conservation, the majority of children simply said that we need rainforests to survive.
sentences.translation: 在回答关于雨林保护重要性的最后一个问题时，大多数儿童只是说我们需要雨林才能生存。

structure.text: In answer to the final question about the importance of rainforest conservation
that we need rainforests to survive

difficult_points: In answer to 表示“在回答……时”，引出回答的背景。
the majority of children 是主语，表示多数儿童。
that 从句是 said 的宾语，说明他们的回答内容。
to survive 表示 need rainforests 的目的或必要性。

sentences.sentence: Only a few of the pupils (6%) mentioned that rainforest destruction may contribute to global warming.
sentences.translation: 只有少数学生（6%）提到雨林破坏可能会加剧全球变暖。

structure.text: Only a few of the pupils (6%)
that rainforest destruction may contribute to global warming

difficult_points: Only a few 强调提到这一点的人数很少。
that 从句说明 mentioned 的内容。
may contribute to 表示可能产生影响，不是确定因果。
global warming 是雨林破坏可能影响的环境问题。

sentences.sentence: This is surprising considering the high level of media coverage on this issue.
sentences.translation: 考虑到媒体对这一问题的高度报道，这一点令人惊讶。

structure.text: considering the high level of media coverage on this issue

difficult_points: This 指前一句只有少数学生提到全球变暖这一事实。
considering 在这里作介词化分词，表示“考虑到”。
the high level of media coverage 说明作者认为这一结果令人惊讶的原因。

sentences.sentence: Some children expressed the idea that the conservation of rainforests is not important.
sentences.translation: 一些儿童表达了这样的想法：保护雨林并不重要。

structure.text: the idea that the conservation of rainforests is not important
that the conservation of rainforests is not important

difficult_points: the idea 后的 that 从句解释这个想法的具体内容。
the conservation of rainforests 是 that 从句的主语。
is not important 表明这些儿童对保护雨林价值的否定态度。

sentences.sentence: The results of this study suggest that certain ideas predominate in the thinking of children about rainforests.
sentences.translation: 这项研究的结果表明，某些观念在儿童关于雨林的思考中占主导地位。

structure.text: that certain ideas predominate in the thinking of children about rainforests
in the thinking of children about rainforests

difficult_points: The results of this study 是主语，suggest 引出研究结论。
that 从句说明结果所表明的内容。
predominate 表示“占主导地位”，不是简单的“存在”。
about rainforests 修饰 children's thinking，说明思考的主题。

expressions.text: the results of this study suggest that

sentences.sentence: Pupils' responses indicate some misconceptions in basic scientific knowledge of rainforests' ecosystems such as their ideas about rainforests as habitats for animals, plants and humans and the relationship between climatic change and destruction of rainforests.
sentences.translation: 学生的回答显示，他们在关于雨林生态系统的基础科学知识方面存在一些误解，例如把雨林看作动物、植物和人类栖息地的想法，以及气候变化与雨林破坏之间关系的认识。

structure.text: some misconceptions in basic scientific knowledge of rainforests' ecosystems
in basic scientific knowledge of rainforests' ecosystems
such as their ideas about rainforests as habitats for animals, plants and humans and the relationship between climatic change and destruction of rainforests
between climatic change and destruction of rainforests

difficult_points: indicate 表示回答“显示、表明”存在误解。
in basic scientific knowledge 限定 misconceptions 发生的知识领域。
such as 后列出两类误解：关于栖息地的想法，以及关于气候变化和雨林破坏关系的理解。
between climatic change and destruction of rainforests 是 relationship 的核心搭配。

sentences.sentence: Pupils did not volunteer ideas that suggested that they appreciated the complexity of causes of rainforest destruction.
sentences.translation: 学生并没有主动提出能表明他们理解雨林破坏原因复杂性的想法。

structure.text: ideas that suggested that they appreciated the complexity of causes of rainforest destruction
that suggested that they appreciated the complexity of causes of rainforest destruction
that they appreciated the complexity of causes of rainforest destruction
the complexity of causes of rainforest destruction

difficult_points: volunteer ideas 表示“主动提出想法”，不是“做志愿者”。
ideas 后的 that 是定语从句，修饰 ideas。
suggested 后又接一个 that 宾语从句，形成嵌套从句。
the complexity of causes 强调原因的复杂性，而不是单一原因。

sentences.sentence: In other words, they gave no indication of an appreciation of either the range of ways in which rainforests are important or the complex social, economic and political factors which drive the activities which are destroying the rainforests.
sentences.translation: 换句话说，他们没有表现出认识到雨林重要性的多种方式，也没有表现出理解那些推动雨林破坏活动的复杂社会、经济和政治因素。

structure.text: of an appreciation of either the range of ways in which rainforests are important or the complex social, economic and political factors which drive the activities which are destroying the rainforests
either the range of ways in which rainforests are important or the complex social, economic and political factors
which drive the activities which are destroying the rainforests

difficult_points: In other words 用来换一种方式总结上一句。
gave no indication of 表示“没有显示出……迹象”。
either ... or ... 连接两个并列宾语：重要性的多种方式和复杂因素。
which drive the activities which are destroying the rainforests 含有嵌套定语从句，分别修饰 factors 和 activities。

sentences.sentence: One encouragement is that the results of similar studies about other environmental issues suggest that older children seem to acquire the ability to appreciate, value and evaluate conflicting views.
sentences.translation: 一个令人鼓舞之处是，关于其他环境问题的类似研究结果表明，年龄较大的儿童似乎会获得理解、重视并评估相互冲突观点的能力。

structure.text: that the results of similar studies about other environmental issues suggest that older children seem to acquire the ability to appreciate, value and evaluate conflicting views
the results of similar studies about other environmental issues
that older children seem to acquire the ability to appreciate, value and evaluate conflicting views
to appreciate, value and evaluate conflicting views

difficult_points: One encouragement is that ... 表示“令人鼓舞的一点是……”。
主句补语 that 从句中又包含 suggest 后的 that 宾语从句。
seem to acquire 表示“似乎获得”，语气较谨慎。
to appreciate, value and evaluate conflicting views 用三个并列动词说明 ability 的内容。

sentences.sentence: Environmental education offers an arena in which these skills can be developed, which is essential for these children as future decision-makers.
sentences.translation: 环境教育提供了一个可以培养这些技能的场域，而这对于这些将来要成为决策者的儿童来说至关重要。

structure.text: an arena in which these skills can be developed
in which these skills can be developed
which is essential for these children as future decision-makers

difficult_points: in which 引导定语从句，修饰 arena。
can be developed 是被动语态，说明技能可以在环境教育中被培养。
which is essential 指代前面整个环境教育培养技能的作用。
as future decision-makers 说明这些儿童未来的社会角色。

expressions.meaning_zh: 提供一个场域；提供平台
